name: context-menu
description: Long-press context menu with viewport-clamped positioning, destructive item support, and separator dividers.

props.name: items
props.description: Array of context menu item definitions to display.

props.name: onSelect
props.description: Callback fired when the user selects a menu item.

props.name: children
props.description: Trigger element wrapped in a long-press Pressable.

props.name: accessibilityLabel
props.description: Screen-reader label for the long-press trigger Pressable.

props.name: menuStyle
props.description: Additional style applied to the floating menu container.

examples.label: Example 1
examples.code:
// Basic usage with action items
<ContextMenu
  accessibilityLabel="Message options"
  items={[
    { label: 'Copy', value: 'copy', icon: '📋' },
    { label: 'Reply', value: 'reply', icon: '↩️' },
    { label: 'Delete', value: 'delete', icon: '🗑', destructive: true },
  ]}
  onSelect={(value) => handleAction(value)}>
  <Text>Long press me</Text>
</ContextMenu>

examples.label: Example 2
Example 3
examples.code:
// Long-press on a list item row
<ContextMenu
  accessibilityLabel="Contact options"
  items={[
    { label: 'Call', value: 'call', icon: '📞' },
    { label: 'Message', value: 'message', icon: '💬' },
    { label: 'Block', value: 'block', destructive: true },
  ]}
  onSelect={handleContactAction}>
  <ContactRow contact={contact} />
</ContextMenu>
